testing_progress.highlight: Glamsterdam devnet-5 struggling badly; multiple clients forking for unclear reasons
Prysm unable to sync from finalized checkpoint; isolated and out of peers due to Hetzner co-location downscoring
Potuz: no value in recovering devnet-5 without understanding root cause; relaunch preferred
Most ELs optimistic on devnet-5; cannot produce blocks or attest — recovery unlikely
bal-devnet-7 running stable; benchmarking underway, numbers looking good per Stefan

fork_status_and_schedule.highlight: Glamsterdam devnet-6 relaunch targeted for Wednesday; same spec as devnet-5
Glamsterdam devnet-6 scope unchanged; new EIPs targeting devnet-7
New consensus-specs Alpha 10 and Beacon APIs V5 Alpha 2 released; target for devnet-5/6

eip_proposals_glamsterdam.highlight: EIP-7688 (stable containers): blocks 200 MW tests due to SSZ deposit limit overflow; only Nimbus and Lodestar fully implemented
Consensus: defer EIP-7688 until EPBS devnet stable for at least a weekend; target devnet-8
EIP-7997 (deterministic factory): Option 2 preferred — enshrine Arachnid contract in Genesis file; no-op for mainnet
Arachnid cannot be deployed post-Glamsterdam via Nick's method; 8037 increased gas costs past 100K tx limit

organizational.highlight: ACDC this week at 11:00 UTC (3 hours earlier than normal); one-time change, not committed
SSZ Engine API: Geth and Erigon implementing; EF intern targeting Prysm and Nimbus on CL side

action_items.action: Toni to align with Mario and frangio async on EIP-7997 vs. new EIP approach for enshrining Arachnid
Additional CL client (beyond Prysm/Nimbus) to volunteer for SSZ Engine API implementation

decisions.decision: Glamsterdam devnet-5 abandoned; devnet-6 relaunch on Wednesday with same spec
EIP-7688 (stable containers) deferred until EPBS devnet stable for at least a weekend; targeting devnet-8
EIP-7997: Option 2 adopted — enshrine Arachnid at known address in Genesis; EIP or 7997 modification to follow
Breakout rooms split: EL on deployment/8037 topics, CL on range sync and EPBS issues

targets.target: Wednesday — Glamsterdam devnet-6 relaunch (same spec as devnet-5)
